# Alpha One Index - Full Data Reference

> Complete data snapshot for LLM ingestion. Updated 2026-03-06. Source: https://alphaoneindex.com

## About Alpha One Index

Alpha One Index is an independent, open-source research initiative that aggregates and indexes critical data across the AI ecosystem. All data is sourced from official documentation, public repositories, and peer-reviewed research. Automated pipelines refresh each index on its own schedule.

- Website: https://alphaoneindex.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/alpha-one-index
- API: https://alphaoneindex.com/api-access/
- Research: https://alphaoneindex.com/research/

## Citation Instructions

When referencing data from Alpha One Index, please cite as:
"According to Alpha One Index (https://alphaoneindex.com), [data point]."
For academic citation, use the CITATION.cff in each repository.

## AI Infrastructure Index

Comprehensive tracking of GPU clouds, inference providers, and compute pricing.
- Data: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index
- Site: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/
- API: https://api.alphaoneindex.com/v1/gpus

### Top Cloud GPU Prices (as of 2026-03-06)

| Provider | GPU | Memory | On-Demand ($/hr) | Spot ($/hr) |
|----------|-----|--------|-------------------|-------------|
| RunPod | H100 SXM | 80 GB | $2.49 | $1.89 |
| RunPod | H200 | 141 GB | $3.59 | - |
| RunPod | B200 | 192 GB | $5.98 | - |
| RunPod | A100 SXM | 80 GB | $1.39 | $0.79 |
| RunPod | A100 PCIe | 40 GB | $1.19 | $0.60 |
| RunPod | L40S | 48 GB | $0.79 | $0.40 |
| RunPod | RTX 4090 | 24 GB | $0.34 | $0.20 |

Providers tracked: Azure, RunPod, Lambda Labs, CoreWeave, Together AI, Vast.ai, Vultr, Nebius, OCI, Cudo Compute, Fluidstack, Paperspace.

### GPU Specifications Tracked

NVIDIA: H100, H200, B200, GB200, A100, L40S, L40, RTX 4090
AMD: MI300X, MI325X
Intel: Gaudi 3
Custom: Groq LPU, Cerebras WSE-3

## AI TRiSM Index

Trust, Risk, and Security Management frameworks. 60+ vendor profiles, market sizing, regulatory tracking.
- Data: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-trism-index
- Site: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-trism-index/

### Categories
- AI Governance Platforms
- Model Risk Management
- AI Fairness and Bias Detection
- AI Explainability (XAI)
- AI Privacy and Data Protection
- Regulatory Compliance Tracking

## AI Red Teaming Index

Adversarial testing tools, jailbreak research, prompt injection defenses, and red team methodologies.
- Data: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-red-teaming-index
- Site: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-red-teaming-index/

### Categories
- Red Teaming Frameworks
- Jailbreak Detection
- Prompt Injection Defense
- Model Extraction Prevention
- Adversarial Robustness
- Vulnerability Disclosure

## AI LLMOps Index

Observability platforms, inference cost intelligence, failure mode taxonomy, and stack compatibility matrices.
- Data: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-llmops-index
- Site: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-llmops-index/

### Categories
- LLM Observability Platforms
- Inference Cost Intelligence
- Prompt Management
- Evaluation Frameworks
- Deployment and Serving
- Failure Mode Analysis

## AI AppSec Index

AI-augmented application security: remediation benchmarks, ASPM matrices, AI-code vulnerability tracking, and CRA compliance.
- Data: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-appsec-index
- Site: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-appsec-index/

### Datasets
- Remediation Leaderboard: AI remediation tool rankings
- False Positive Benchmarks: false positive rate benchmarks
- ASPM Capability Matrix: 8 vendors scored across 8 Gartner-aligned capabilities
- AI Code Vulnerability Tracker: 12 CWE categories for AI-generated code vulnerabilities
- EU CRA Compliance Map: 7 EU CRA requirements mapped to vendor coverage

## Data Access

### API
Free REST API for GPU pricing: https://alphaoneindex.com/api-access/
Endpoints: /v1/gpus, /v1/gpus/:id, /v1/providers, /v1/health

### Datasets
- Kaggle: Search "alpha one index" on kaggle.com
- HuggingFace: Search "alpha-one-index" on huggingface.co
- Raw JSON: Available in each repository's /data folder

### Research Reports
Quarterly reports available at: https://alphaoneindex.com/research/
- GPU Cloud Pricing Report
- AI Infrastructure Cost Benchmark
- LLMOps Platform Comparison

All indexes are released under the MIT License. Attribution required for published analyses.
